title: Santarém Heat Wave
lead: A critical heat wave is affecting Santarém, with a Z-Score of +3.29. Temperatures are extremely high, reaching a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Santarém is causing significant disruptions, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) of 10.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 71%, and wind speed is 5.8 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The lack of Heating Degree Days (HDD) indicates a prolonged period of warm weather, with no relief in sight.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
